actual_crate_recovery_units.rationale: Risk 1 names >216K returns as the budget-exhaustion scenario at the 5 DKK incentive; base just below the 108K target reflects realistic dual-channel participation under tiered incentive deceleration.

actual_program_spend_dkk.rationale: Bottom-up: donation × volume + logistics + marketing; base near the DKK 4M ceiling; upper bound captures Risk 1 budget-exhaustion + Risk 8 logistics-overrun combined scenario.

actual_donation_dkk.rationale: Donation = volume × incentive capped at the DKK 1.35M pool ceiling; base just above the DKK 500K floor reflects mid-range volume and tiered-incentive deceleration policy.

actual_social_impressions.rationale: Risk 3 names a 50% impression drop if irreverent marketing alienates partners; base just below 20M target reflects realistic execution; upside captures aggressive viral pickup.

actual_per_crate_handling_cost_dkk.rationale: Q1 budget breakdown implies DKK ~15 as the channel-overrun trigger; Risk 8 names DKK 10 as the review trigger; base just above the threshold reflects realistic centralized-hub cost structure.

target_impressions.rationale: Plan commits to 20M organic impressions; spread reflects how strictly the success-metric definition treats the threshold — looser at the lower end (paid amplification offsets), stricter at the upper.

per_crate_handling_cost_threshold_dkk.rationale: Risk 8 names DKK 10 as the channel-prioritization review trigger; Q1 names DKK 15 as the 30%-overrun trigger; spread captures how strictly downstream decision rules interpret the threshold.
